caption:
Some mornings in Hokkaido you don't measure snowfall in centimetres. The van needs digging out, the power lines wear pillows, and the walk to the lift is through knee-deep fresh — before the skiing even starts.

This is what a January storm cycle looks like up here. It can snow like this for days, quietly, with almost no wind. That's why the snow stays so light.

Next winter's weeks are taking shape now. If you've been thinking about Japan, send us a message and we'll tell you how it works.

#japow #hokkaido #snowfall #japanskiing #powderskiing #winterinjapan #skitouring
